title: Social Media: Older Adults | Respiratory Illnesses | CDC
text:
VID-19 
Seasonal Flu 
Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) 
Respiratory Illnesses 
Social Media: Older Adults 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this social media carousel and sample messages to encourage older adults to take action to protect themselves from severe illness from respiratory viruses such as flu, COVID-19, and RSV. Available in English and Spanish.
Format: PNG Dimensions: 1080 x 1080 pixels Language: English (US) Size: 509 KB Length: Last updated: August 18, 2025
